title: Architect's Palette [Fabric]
description: Adds various new blocks to build and tinker with!
body: ### This is a port of the [forge mod](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/architects-palette) made by Jsburg. *Unleash the architect inside of you!* This mod is survival friendly and aims at helping you with all kinds of builds. Whether you're building giant castle walls, a frozen wizard's tower, ruins in the end, a busy workshop, or even just a basement made of meat, **Architect's Palette** provides you with a unique collection of blocks designed to bring new colors and textures to your builds. Be sure to check out villagers, the wadering trader, and the advancements for more coool stuff. Feel free to join and talk about the mod in [discord](https://discord.gg/hMkfjPDkSD) --- Credits - Special thanks to: -**Jsburg and the art team:** for making an outstanding mod -**Chronosacaria:** for helping me with the villager trades (since I'm a newbie) --- ### If you are considering supporting me, buy me a coffee! --- Images - ![sunmetal](https://i.imgur.com/jeuTpOU.png) ![sewer](https://imgur.com/I4lq9oi.png) ![tower](https://i.imgur.com/1zj9N9j.png)
